element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Emphasized as innovative technique; noted as difficult to control
Paired with dive as signature move; control difficulty cited by reviewers

element_introduction_order.first_appears: Late game (Jacques Le Sheets at paper factory)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Culminates in final boss Edgar Ektor on flying ship

typical_relief_triggers: Parachute escape sequence at game end
typical_tension_triggers: Difficult dive and swoop move execution
Capture narrative moments (Amy captured, Amy's father captured)
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Platformer with combat peaks; difficulty spikes due to control-demanding signature moves

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introduction to basic platforming on beach; early dive/swoop move introduction creates immediate control challenge
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Forest progression with increasing enemy complexity and platforming demands
difficulty_curve.late_game: Paper factory and flying ship sequences with boss encounters; escalates from Jacques Le Sheets to final boss Edgar Ektor
notable_spikes: Dive and swoop move mastery required early (control difficulty noted by multiple reviewers)
Jacques Le Sheets boss fight and transition to flying ship pursuit
Final Edgar Ektor encounter on airborne ship

notable_level_patterns.description: Game world stages correspond to story beats: beach crash → Stony Forest (homeland) → paper factory → flying ship. Each location escalates threat and narrative stakes.
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Beach starting area through Stony Forest progression to paper factory

notable_level_patterns.description: Level design culminates in boss encounters, with final confrontation presenting multiple antagonists (Le Sheets revealed as secondary, Edgar Ektor as true mastermind)
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Paper factory (Jacques Le Sheets) and flying ship (Edgar Ektor)

notable_level_patterns.description: Dive and swoop moves presented early as core mechanics but require significant skill investment; reviewers noted these moves are 'too difficult to control' but also 'innovative,' suggesting they gate progression through difficulty
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Integrated throughout but emphasized in early/mid-game sections
